# Tool — claude_md_diff_watch

> Auto-generated by `spec/tools/gen_spec.py`. Do not hand-edit.

## Synopsis

Canon: §Operator — auto-injects the diff of CLAUDE.md since the operator's last turn into session context via a UserPromptSubmit hook.

## Module docstring

Canon: §Operator — auto-injects the diff of CLAUDE.md since the operator's last turn into session context via a UserPromptSubmit hook.

## CLI usage

```
usage: claude_md_diff_watch.py [-h]

Emit a UserPromptSubmit hook payload containing the diff of CLAUDE.md since
the last turn, or nothing if unchanged.

options:
  -h, --help  show this help message and exit
```
